---
title: "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density"
output:
  github_document: default
---

```{r setup-and-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel) 

# --- 1. Configuration & Data Load ---
dir_base_data_4TB <- "/Volumes/SanDisk4TB/SternBrocot-data"

# --- 1.2 Display Configuration ---
config_min_node_count <- 0
config_max_node_count <- 30
config_min_momentum <- 0.5
config_max_momentum <- 10

# Action bounds (A = P^2)
config_min_action <- config_min_momentum^2
config_max_action <- config_max_momentum^2

# Pipeline Directories
dir_01_raw_erasures           <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "01_harmonic_oscillator_erasures")
dir_02_densities              <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "02_harmonic_oscillator_densities")
dir_03_nodes                  <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "03_harmonic_oscillator_nodes")
dir_04_summary                <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "04_harmonic_oscillator_summary")

# Summary Files (UPDATED NOMENCLATURE)
file_04_summary_erasure_displacement <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_erasure_displacement_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_selected_microstate  <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_selected_microstate_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_sequence_length      <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_sequence_length_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_resonance_margin     <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_resonance_margin_summary.csv.gz")

if (!file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_displacement)) {
  stop("Erasure Displacement Summary file not found at: ", file_04_summary_erasure_displacement)
}

# In-Memory Data Tables
dt_summary_erasure_displacement <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_displacement)) fread(file_04_summary_erasure_displacement) else data.table()
dt_summary_selected_microstate <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_selected_microstate)) fread(file_04_summary_selected_microstate) else data.table()
dt_summary_sequence_length <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_sequence_length)) fread(file_04_summary_sequence_length) else data.table()
dt_summary_resonance_margin <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_resonance_margin)) fread(file_04_summary_resonance_margin) else data.table()

# --- 1.5 Physics Constants & Action Mapping ---
# Zero-Point Energy offset for the Quantum Harmonic Oscillator.
# A = P^2. n = A - 0.5
qho_zpe_offset <- 0.0

# Map Momentum to Action Space
if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement)>0) dt_summary_erasure_displacement[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_selected_microstate)>0) dt_summary_selected_microstate[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length)>0) dt_summary_sequence_length[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_resonance_margin)>0) dt_summary_resonance_margin[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]

# --- 2. Auto-Selection Logic (Erasure Displacement) ---

# Extract the EXACT P = 0.500 (A = 0.25) baseline from the RAW data
row_0500 <- copy(dt_summary_erasure_displacement[abs(normalized_momentum - 0.500) < 1e-4])
if (nrow(row_0500) > 0) {
  row_0500 <- row_0500[1]
  row_0500[, node_count := 0] # Force n=0 so it plots correctly
  if ("snr_metric" %in% names(row_0500)) row_0500[, snr_metric := 0]
}

valid_summaries <- dt_summary_erasure_displacement[!is.na(node_count) & node_count >= 0]

# SELECTION A: Closest to Theoretical Action Line (n = A)
idx_closest_line <- valid_summaries[, .I[which.min(abs(action_A - (node_count + qho_zpe_offset)))], by = node_count]$V1
dt_line_picked <- valid_summaries[idx_closest_line]
dt_line_picked <- dt_line_picked[node_count != 0] # Strip the algorithm's noisy n=0 pick
if(nrow(row_0500) > 0) dt_line_picked <- rbind(dt_line_picked, row_0500, fill = TRUE)
setorder(dt_line_picked, node_count)
dt_selected_line <- dt_line_picked[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & action_A >= config_min_action & action_A <= config_max_action]

# --- Auto-Selection Logic (Selected Microstate) ---
if (exists("dt_summary_selected_microstate") && nrow(dt_summary_selected_microstate) > 0) {
  
  row_0500_action <- copy(dt_summary_selected_microstate[abs(normalized_momentum - 0.500) < 1e-4])
  if (nrow(row_0500_action) > 0) {
    row_0500_action <- row_0500_action[1]
    row_0500_action[, node_count := 0]
    if ("snr_metric" %in% names(row_0500_action)) row_0500_action[, snr_metric := 0]
  }
  
  valid_summaries_microstate <- dt_summary_selected_microstate[!is.na(node_count) & node_count >= 0]
  
  # SELECTION A: Action Line
  idx_closest_line_microstate <- valid_summaries_microstate[, .I[which.min(abs(action_A - (node_count + qho_zpe_offset)))], by = node_count]$V1
  dt_line_picked_microstate <- valid_summaries_microstate[idx_closest_line_microstate]
  dt_line_picked_microstate <- dt_line_picked_microstate[node_count != 0]
  if(nrow(row_0500_action) > 0) dt_line_picked_microstate <- rbind(dt_line_picked_microstate, row_0500_action, fill = TRUE)
  setorder(dt_line_picked_microstate, node_count)
  dt_selected_microstate_line <- dt_line_picked_microstate[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & action_A >= config_min_action & action_A <= config_max_action]
}

dynamic_height_line <- max(5, nrow(dt_selected_line) * 4.0 + 1)
```

```{r plot-2A-overview-scatter-erasure-displacement, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# --- Plot 2A: Overview Scatter Plot (Erasure Displacement) ---
qho_linear_backbone <- function(A) { A - qho_zpe_offset }

if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement) > 0) {
  dt_background_erasure_displacement <- dt_summary_erasure_displacement[
    !is.na(node_count) & 
    node_count >= config_min_node_count & 
    node_count <= config_max_node_count & 
    action_A >= config_min_action &
    action_A <= config_max_action
  ]
  
  dt_background_erasure_displacement[, snr_relative := frank(snr_metric, ties.method = "average") / .N, by = node_count]
  
  p_ov_action_a <- ggplot() +
    stat_function(fun = qho_linear_backbone, 
                  n = 1001, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = dt_background_erasure_displacement[order(snr_relative)], 
               aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, color = snr_relative), 
               size = 1.5, alpha = 1.0) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "black", high = "grey85", name = "Local SNR\n(Percentile)") +  
    
    geom_point(data = dt_selected_line, aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, shape = "Linear Fit"), 
               color = "black", size = 5.5, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2) +
               
    scale_shape_manual(name = "Selection Method", values = c("Linear Fit" = 21)) +
    
    geom_text(data = dt_selected_line, aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, 
              label = sprintf("n=%d A=%.2f snr=%.1f", node_count, action_A, snr_metric)),
              nudge_y = config_max_node_count * 0.015, 
              size = 3, color = "black", fontface = "bold", family = "mono") +
              
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_action), floor(config_max_action), by = 10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(config_min_node_count, config_max_node_count, by = 5)) +
    
    labs(title = "Node Count vs Action: Erasure Displacement",
         subtitle = sprintf("Continuous phase-space evolution perfectly follows linear n = A map"),
         x = "Action (A)", y = "Nodes (n)") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_action, config_max_action), ylim = c(config_min_node_count - 0.5, config_max_node_count)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  print(p_ov_action_a)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-3-sequence-length-evolution, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 3: Sequence Length Summary ---
if (nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length) > 0) {
  
  dt_filtered_prog_len <- dt_summary_sequence_length[
    action_A >= config_min_action & 
    action_A <= config_max_action
  ]
  
  p_prog <- ggplot(dt_filtered_prog_len, aes(x = action_A)) +
    # Absolute Min/Max Outer Ribbon
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_len, ymax = max_len, fill = "Absolute Range"), alpha = 0.3) +
    # Standard Deviation Inner Ribbon
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = "±1 SD"), alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Variance", values = c("Absolute Range" = "grey90", "±1 SD" = "grey70")) +
    
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_len, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_len, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_action), floor(config_max_action), by = 10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(dt_filtered_prog_len$max_len, na.rm=T) + 1, by = 1)) +
    
    labs(title = "Thermodynamic Complexity vs Action",
         subtitle = "Demonstrating the strict macroscopic bound: N E_L \\tau \\le A",
         x = "Action (A)", 
         y = "Sequence Length (N bits)") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_action, config_max_action)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(p_prog)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("*(Sequence length summary data not yet generated)*\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-4-correspondence-limit, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 4: Thermodynamic Correspondence Limit (Geometric Slack) ---

if (nrow(dt_summary_resonance_margin) > 0) {
  
  dt_filtered_res <- dt_summary_resonance_margin[
    action_A >= config_min_action & 
    action_A <= config_max_action
  ]
  
  p_res <- ggplot(dt_filtered_res, aes(x = action_A)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_residual, ymax = upper_residual), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_residual, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_residual, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_action), floor(config_max_action), by = 10)) +
    
    labs(title = "Thermodynamic Correspondence Limit",
         subtitle = expression(paste("Ensemble average of unspent phase-space capacity (", delta, "q - |", epsilon[q], "|) over Action")),
         x = "Action (A)", 
         y = expression(paste("Geometric Slack  ", delta, "q - |", epsilon[q], "|"))) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_action, config_max_action)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(p_res)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("*(Correspondence limit summary data not yet generated)*\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r setup-plotting-functions, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# --- Function: Render Combined Erasure Displacement Grid ---
render_combined_erasure_displacement_grid <- function(dt_target_momenta, custom_title) {
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    action_val <- current_row$action_A
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    file_density_erasure_displacement <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_displacement_density_stern_brocot_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    dt_histogram_points <- data.table()
    n_bins_text <- ""
    
    if (file.exists(file_density_erasure_displacement)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density_erasure_displacement)
      if (nrow(dt_histogram_points) > 0) {
        n_bins_text <- sprintf("\nbins = %d", nrow(dt_histogram_points))
      }
    }
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 1. Conjugate Quanta
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    a_base <- momentum_val / 0.5
    b_base <- 0.5 / momentum_val
    scaling_factor <- 90 / max(a_base, b_base) 
    
    ellipse_df <- data.frame(
      type = factor(c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate"), levels = c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate")),
      major = c(a_base, b_base) * scaling_factor,
      minor = c(b_base, a_base) * scaling_factor
    )
    
    p_ell <- ggplot(ellipse_df) +
      geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, a = major, b = minor, angle = 0, color = type, fill = type), 
                   alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray60")) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray30")) +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(-100, 100)) +
      
      labs(y = sprintf("A = %.2f\nn = %d%s", action_val, current_row$node_count, n_bins_text)) +
      
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
            axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold", size = 12, margin = margin(r = 15)), 
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (i == 1) p_ell <- p_ell + labs(title = "Conjugate Blobs") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 2. Selected Microstate vs. Microstate 
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_stern_brocot_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_scat <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)) 
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures, colClasses=c(encoded_sequence="character"))[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) > 0) {
        # If you named it blob_center in C++:
        p_scat <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = blob_center, y = selected_microstate)) +
          geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.1, color = "black") + 
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    if (i == 1) p_scat <- p_scat + labs(title = "Selected vs. True Microstate") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 3. Coordinate Density
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_nodes_erasure_displacement <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_displacement_nodes_stern_brocot_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_den <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (nrow(dt_histogram_points) > 0) {
      dt_active_bins <- copy(dt_histogram_points)
      
      max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (max_density_height == 0) max_density_height <- 1
      
      raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
      max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
      if (max_coordinate_edge == 0) max_coordinate_edge <- 1
      
      dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
      
      skyline_x <- c(dt_active_bins$pct_q[1] - pct_bar_width/2, 
                     rep(dt_active_bins$pct_q, each = 2) + rep(c(-pct_bar_width/2, pct_bar_width/2), nrow(dt_active_bins)), 
                     dt_active_bins$pct_q[nrow(dt_active_bins)] + pct_bar_width/2)
      
      skyline_y <- c(0, rep(dt_active_bins$pct_density, each = 2), 0)
      dt_skyline_outline <- data.table::data.table(pct_q = skyline_x, pct_density = skyline_y)
      
      dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes_erasure_displacement)) fread(file_nodes_erasure_displacement) else data.table()
      if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
        dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      }
      
      p_den <- ggplot() +
        geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "gray85") +
        geom_path(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) + 
        geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", size = 1.5) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
              axis.text = element_blank(),
              panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    }
    
    if (i == 1) p_den <- p_den + labs(title = "Erasure Density") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 4. Append row to Master List
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_ell
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_scat
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_den
  }
  
  final_grid <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = custom_title,
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "mono"),
                    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"))
    )
  
  if(nrow(dt_target_momenta) > 0) print(final_grid)
}
```

```{r plot-1A-grid-parabola, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=dynamic_height_line, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1A: Erasure Displacement Grid (Linear Action Fit) ---
render_combined_erasure_displacement_grid(dt_selected_line, "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density (Linear Action Fit)")
```

```{r generate_tree}
# Function to generate the algorithmic state-space tree up to max_depth
generate_tree <- function(max_depth) {
  nodes <- list(
    list(
      depth = 0, num = 0, den = 1,
      l_num = -1, l_den = 0, r_num = 1, r_den = 0,
      bin = "", parent_x = NA_real_, parent_y = NA_real_
    )
  )
  
  all_nodes <- nodes
  
  for (d in 1:max_depth) {
    new_nodes <- list()
    for (node in nodes) {
      left_node <- list(
        depth = d, num = node$l_num + node$num, den = node$l_den + node$den,
        l_num = node$l_num, l_den = node$l_den, r_num = node$num, r_den = node$den,
        bin = paste0(node$bin, "0"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth
      )
      right_node <- list(
        depth = d, num = node$num + node$r_num, den = node$den + node$r_den,
        l_num = node$num, l_den = node$den, r_num = node$r_num, r_den = node$r_den,
        bin = paste0(node$bin, "1"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth
      )
      new_nodes <- append(new_nodes, list(left_node, right_node))
    }
    all_nodes <- append(all_nodes, new_nodes)
    nodes <- new_nodes
  }
  
  df <- bind_rows(all_nodes) %>%
    mutate(
      x = num / den,
      y = depth,
      frac_label = paste0(num, "/", den),
      bin_label = ifelse(bin == "", "(zero bits)", bin)
    )
  
  return(df)
}

max_k <- 4
tree_data <- generate_tree(max_k)
```

```{r plot_tree, fig.width=14, fig.height=8, dpi=300}
# --- ISOLATE AND LABEL THE ERASURE PATH ---
target_bin <- "1101" # This targets the 5/3 node

# Helper functions for the reverse inverse
invert_bit <- function(s) {
  chars <- unlist(strsplit(s, ""))
  inv <- ifelse(chars == "1", "0", "1")
  paste(inv, collapse = "")
}

reverse_string <- function(s) {
  paste(rev(unlist(strsplit(s, ""))), collapse = "")
}

# Calculate the full initial erasure string (the reverse complement)
s_star_full <- invert_bit(reverse_string(target_bin))

# Dynamically generate all prefixes
path_bins <- sapply(0:nchar(target_bin), function(i) substr(target_bin, 1, i))

# Filter the tree and calculate the shrinking erase string (ShiftLeft) for each segment
path_data <- tree_data %>% 
  filter(bin %in% path_bins) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    bits_popped = nchar(target_bin) - nchar(bin),
    erase_str = ifelse(!is.na(parent_x), substr(s_star_full, bits_popped + 1, nchar(s_star_full)), ""),
    erase_label = ifelse(erase_str != "", paste0("s*=", erase_str), ""),
    mid_x = (x + parent_x) / 2,
    mid_y = (y + parent_y) / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tree_data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = parent_x, yend = parent_y), 
    color = "gray85", 
    linewidth = 0.8,
    na.rm = TRUE  
  ) +
  geom_point(color = "gray75", size = 2) +
  
  geom_segment(
    data = path_data,
    aes(xend = parent_x, yend = parent_y), 
    color = "black", 
    linewidth = 1.2,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.15, "inches"), type = "closed"),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = path_data,
    color = "black", 
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  
  geom_label(
    data = filter(path_data, erase_label != ""),
    aes(x = mid_x, y = mid_y, label = erase_label),
    family = "mono", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5,
    color = "white", fill = "black",
    label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.2, "lines")
  ) +
  
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = frac_label),
    direction = "x", nudge_y = 0.15, segment.color = "gray85", 
    segment.size = 0.2, size = 3.5, color = "black", fill = "white",          
    label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"), vjust = 0,                 
    box.padding = 0.1, max.overlaps = Inf       
  ) +
  
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = bin_label),
    direction = "x", nudge_y = -0.15, segment.color = "gray85", 
    segment.size = 0.2, size = 3.5, family = "mono", color = "black",
    fill = "white", label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    vjust = 1, box.padding = 0.1, max.overlaps = Inf       
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 0:max_k, 
    limits = c(-0.3, max_k + 0.3), 
    name = "Sequence Length (N bits)"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = -4:4, 
    name = "Coordinate (q)",
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.05) 
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, color = "gray30"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Selected Microstate Information Tree (-Inf to +Inf)",
    subtitle = "Highlighting the thermodynamic erasure sequence for q_mu = 5/3"
  )
```
